The '''''Fxz'Et''''' was a [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]] [[720 light freighter/Legends|720 light freighter]] that had been abandoned on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] prior to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. Recovered by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] [[Kyli Ned'Ix]], the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was heavily modified and enhanced using spare junk components. Ned'Ix used the vessel to tail the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' during its [[DarkStryder Campaign|expedition]] to find [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who had fled Kal'Shebbol following its [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] by the New Republic.

==Description==
The ''Fxz'Et'' was a thirty-five [[Meter/Legends|meter]] long [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]] [[720 light freighter/Legends|720 light freighter]], considered to be "ancient"<ref name="tdc" /> by [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' takes place four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> The [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was heavily modified by the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] [[Kyli Ned'Ix]] for use as his own personal ship. The ''Fxz'Et'' was equipped with a Class Two [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], with a slower Class Ten back-up module, and had a [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] installed. The ship could attain speeds of 800 [[Kilometer/Legends|kmh]] in [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. Ned'Ix enhanced the ship using junk components that he had personally modified to increase the performance of the craft, and added a single small [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] and a pair of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] [[Proton torpedo launcher/Legends|launchers]] with a magazine of three torpedoes each for defense. The hold of the vessel was full of scavenged junk—including disassembled [[Droid/Legends|droids]], fused [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] circuit boards, and [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drive]] [[Power coupling/Legends|power couplings]]—that Ned'Ix used to create new gadgets. Ideally, the ship was designed to be operated by a crew of three, with room for a single passenger, although Ned'Ix crewed the ''Fxz'Et'' on his own during his [[Time/Legends|time]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. The ''Fxz'Et'' could carry 135 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo, and could store enough [[Foodstuff/Legends|consumables]] to last two [[Standard month/Legends|months]].<ref name="tdc" />

==History==
At some point, the vessel that would become the ''Fxz'Et'' was abandoned on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the Kathol sector.<ref name="tdc" /> In 8 ABY, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] launched an [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|assault]] on the planet in an effort to oust the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]. The mission was partially successful; the planet was freed, but Sarne escaped into the Kathol sector with the majority of his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]].<ref name="tsb">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref>

The New Republic authorized a [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] to track down Sarne and neutralize any threat he may still have posed, assigning the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' to the task. Due to manpower shortages, the New Republic was forced to call for civilian volunteers from Kal'Shebbol to crew the vessel. Ned'Ix applied, but was turned down by the command crew since they felt his penchant for jury-rigging equipment would be a liability. Undeterred, he recovered and repaired the abandoned [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], modifying the vessel using junk components left behind by both Imperial and New Republic forces. Making the vessel [[Realspace/Legends|spaceworthy]], he named the ship "''Fxz'Et''" and launched after the ''FarStar''. Ned'Ix used the vessel as he traveled through the Kathol sector, assisting the New Republic expedition when he was able to.<ref name="tdc" />

==Owners and operators==
[[File:KyliNedIx-TheDarkStryderCampaign.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Kyli Ned'Ix, master of the ''Fxz'Et'']]
The ''Fxz'Et'' was owned and operated by the Verpine master technician Kyli Ned'Ix. Ned'Ix also fancied himself as an adventurer, and—having failed to join the ''FarStar'' mission—resolved to follow the ship in his freighter and offer any assistance he may have been able to render.<ref name="tdc" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Fxz'Et''{{'s}} only appearance was in the "Rogues Gallery" section of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]].<ref name="tdc" />
